channel.title: openapi-spec Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the openapi-spec codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: Documentation Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: Provides human-readable guides and references for the Supermodel tools suite. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: OpenAPI Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The core specification domain responsible for defining the RESTful interface and data models of the Supermodel platform. Architectural overview of the OpenAPI domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: PackageRegistry Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: Manages the distribution and versioning of the specification via the npm ecosystem. Architectural overview of the PackageRegistry domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: package.json — openapi-spec Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
